reasoning: The control AC-4(27) focuses on enforcing information flow with redundant or independent filtering mechanisms. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that NetworkPolicies are in place to enforce traffic filtering, TLS is enforced for Ingress, mutual TLS (mTLS) is enabled in service meshes for secure communication, and admission controllers are used to enforce network policies.
title: Information Flow Enforcement - Information flow enforcement | redundant / independent filtering mechanisms when
